blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,361 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
